html:
Exclusive to:

A Shattered Spider Hole is a naturally occurring Structure, exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them. It spawns Shattered Spiders. As opposed to a regular Spider Den, a Pickaxe is used to break it down, and it provides Rocks, Silk, Moon Shards, and Moon Rocks.

Shattered Spider Holes go through three growth stages, containing 2, 3 and 4 Shattered Spiders, respectively. They can be found in the Lunar Forest and Rocky Beach Biomes on the Lunar Island. They can also spawn 50% of the time when the Spider Queen dies while under Common Mutation condition, or when her Carcass was eaten by a Crystal-Crested Buzzard.

Trivia

  • The Shattered Spider Hole was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
  • The Shattered Spider hole appears to be a Spider Queen that has been encased in Moon Rock. Additionally, it appears that the Queen is still alive, as the legs can be occasionally seen to twitch.

 Gallery

  • Shattered Spider Hole's Animation
DSTDSRoGSWHam

"moonspiderden"
“That's not a normal spider den.”
–Wilson
“I hope it burns.”
–Willow
“Scary things is inside maybe.”
–Wolfgang
“Terrible creatures lurk within.”
–Wendy
“EXTRA-HORRIBLE ORGANICS LIVE THERE”
–WX-78
“Those poor hideous creatures are making their den here.”
–Wickerbottom
“Better not disturb it.”
–Woodie
“I'd rather not peek inside.”
–Maxwell
“I sense battle ön the hörizön.”
–Wigfrid
“They're not so bad once you get to know them.”
–Webber
“Something is different about that spider den...”
–Warly
“Hello? Anyone here?”
–Wormwood
“I don't wanna see whatever's in there.”
–Winona
“I should not like to see inside!”
–Wortox
“Extra nasty Spiderfolk!!”
–Wurt
“Look at that, Woby! It's a home for moon creatures!”
–Walter
“They're not the best decorators, are they?”
–Wanda
A Shattered Spider Hole is a naturally occurring Structure, exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them. It spawns Shattered Spiders. As opposed to a regular Spider Den, a Pickaxe is used to break it down, and it provides Rocks, Silk, Moon Shards, and Moon Rocks.
Shattered Spider Holes go through three growth stages, containing 2, 3 and 4 Shattered Spiders, respectively. They can be found in the Lunar Forest and Rocky Beach Biomes on the Lunar Island. They can also spawn 50% of the time when the Spider Queen dies while under Common Mutation condition, or when her Carcass was eaten by a Crystal-Crested Buzzard.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Shattered Spider Hole was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
The Shattered Spider hole appears to be a Spider Queen that has been encased in Moon Rock. Additionally, it appears that the Queen is still alive, as the legs can be occasionally seen to twitch.
